title: DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW GLADSTONE DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Nickerson Adolescent Day Treatment Program provides mental health treatment and academic services. 18907 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Ages 11-18 who are experiencing serious psychiatric difficulties Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred. Participation requires school district authorization and referral by Coordinated Care Organization or Kaiser Permanente. FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 34 from Portland Avenue, across from Gladstone High School Services: Psychiatric Day Treatment * Adolescents Psychiatric Day Treatment * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW GLADSTONE
